completion_summary: Reviewed 5 assigned laws: PL-003-020 is fully repealed by PL-010-068, PL-004-029/030/031 are repeal-history laws only, and PL-004-032 is a source-defect because the supplied file is an executive order surrogate rather than the enacted act.

laws.title: Public Law 3-20 | National Immigration Employment Act of 2021
laws.status_basis: The PDF source is readable and PL 10-68 expressly repeals Public Law 3-20 in full, so the act survives only as repeal history.

current_implementation.detail: The act is identifiable from the PDF source, but I did not locate a matching codified history note in the current tree.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, severability, and immediate-effective-date language.
provisions.exact_change: Keep this framing material as repeal history only.
provisions.evidence: The opening section only supplies the act name, severability, and effective date.
provisions.notes: No operative code text should be created from this section.

provisions.text_summary: Employment restrictions, waiting-list and background-check rules, citizenship termination procedures, and the Title VI amendment language.
provisions.exact_change: Do not convert this operative language into live Code text; retain it only as repeal history.
provisions.evidence: The section governs federal hiring and citizenship-related employment restrictions and includes a Code-amendment clause.
provisions.notes: This is the core operative material of the act.

provisions.text_summary: Exemptions for military service, private employment, presidential exemptions, and congressional overrides.
provisions.exact_change: Preserve the exemptions only as history.
provisions.evidence: This section limits the employment restrictions through enumerated exceptions and override procedures.
provisions.notes: No separate codification target was recovered.

provisions.exact_change: Keep the enforcement instructions as historical material only.
provisions.evidence: The section assigns implementation and enforcement responsibilities to Congress, the Judiciary, and Citizenship and Immigration Services.
provisions.notes: These instructions do not survive as current positive law.

recommended_actions: Retain only repeal-history treatment for this act.
Do not recreate the employment restrictions as operative Code text.

laws.title: Public Law 4-29 | Department of Commerce and Labor Act of 2022
laws.status_basis: PL 31-226 later repeals Public Law 4-29 in its entirety, so the Commerce and Labor restructuring survives only as repeal history.

current_implementation.detail: I did not locate a matching codified history note or operative text in the current tree.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, severability, and immediate effective date.
provisions.exact_change: Keep the framing clauses as history only.
provisions.evidence: The opening section only supplies the act name and effective-date rules.
provisions.notes: This section creates no live code text.

provisions.text_summary: Definitions for Labor, Commerce, the Secretary of Commerce and Labor, and the President.
provisions.exact_change: Treat the definitions as repeal history only.
provisions.evidence: The source contains a standalone definitions section.
provisions.notes: No operative title 29 rewrite should be left in place.

provisions.text_summary: Department consolidation, transfers, powers, and reporting structure.
provisions.exact_change: Do not keep the transfer framework as current Code text.
provisions.evidence: The source transfers agency assets and establishes the Department of Commerce and Labor's responsibilities.
provisions.notes: This is the main substantive framework and should remain historical only.

recommended_actions: Keep the law as repeal history only.
Do not add live title 29 text for the repealed department framework.

laws.title: Public Law 4-30 | Fugitive Justice Reform Act

current_implementation.detail: The current tree does not show a matching codified history note or operative text for this repealed act.

provisions.evidence: These clauses only introduce the act and state when it takes effect.
provisions.notes: No live code text is created here.

provisions.text_summary: Fugitive list regime and warrant database requirements.

provisions.notes: This is the substantive operational framework of the act.

provisions.notes: These provisions do not survive as live law.

laws.title: Public Law 4-32 | Warrants, Subpoenas, and Summons Act
laws.status_basis: The supplied file is an executive order surrogate that cites Public Law 4-32, but it does not contain the enacted statute text, so the law cannot be treated as authentic statutory source material.

current_implementation.detail: The current tree should not codify the surrogate order; the authentic enacted act must be recovered before any Code action.

provisions.notes: Do not codify the executive-order surrogate.

recommended_actions: Recover the authentic enacted text before any code action.
Do not codify the executive-order surrogate.
